---
title: "Clue 1"
---

```{=html}
<div class="clue-page clue-morph">
<div class="morph-bg">
  <div class="morph-blob morph-blob-1"></div>
  <div class="morph-blob morph-blob-2"></div>
  <div class="morph-blob morph-blob-3"></div>
</div>
<div class="clue-box">
  <h1>Clue 1</h1>
  <p>The first whisper of the cosmos reveals itself here. Placeholder content — replace with your actual clue.</p>
  <p><a href="../">Back to the Heart</a></p>
</div>
</div>
```
